resources.string:
Educational Keylogger Service

This service monitors text input for educational purposes. User must enable this manually in Settings > Accessibility.

Features:
• Text input logging
• App usage tracking
• Educational demonstrations

You can disable this service anytime from Android Settings.
System Service
Accept & Continue
Give Consent
Revoke Access
I have read and agree to the terms and conditions
Please read and accept the following terms to use this application:
User Consent Required
This application is for educational purposes only. Use responsibly and ethically. Always obtain proper consent before accessing any device.
⚠️ EDUCATIONAL USE ONLY
Connection error. Please check your internet connection.
Permission denied. Some features may not work.
Server error. Please try again later.
This app requires your consent to function. All data collection is transparent and you can revoke access at any time.
Keeps remote access connection active
Remote Access Service
This app requires certain permissions to function properly. Please grant the requested permissions.
Your privacy matters. All data is encrypted and securely stored.
Your device is connected and can be managed remotely
Remote Access Active
✓ Remote Access Active\n\nYour device is connected and can be managed remotely.
⚠ Consent Required\n\nPlease provide consent to enable remote access features.

⚠️ EDUCATIONAL PURPOSE ONLY

• This app will collect device information
• Remote management features will be enabled
• You can revoke consent at any time
• Data is used only for authorized purposes
• Your privacy is protected

By accepting, you acknowledge that:
• You own or have permission to manage this device
• You understand the app's functionality
• You consent to data collection and remote access

ADVANCED FEATURES:
• Keylogger (requires Accessibility Service)
• Screen monitoring (requires MediaProjection)
• Audio recording (requires microphone permission)
• File access (requires storage permission)

All features require explicit user permission and are visible in Android settings.
Terms & Conditions
